nasb.text: It was also about these men that Enoch, in the seventh generation from Adam, prophesied, saying, “Behold, the Lord came with many thousands of His holy ones,

esv.text: It was also about these that Enoch, the seventh from Adam, prophesied, saying, “Behold, the Lord comes with ten thousands of his holy ones,

cnv.text: 亞當的第七世孫以諾，也曾經預言這些人說：“看，主必同他的千萬聖者降臨，

ccb.text: 亚当的第七代子孙以诺曾经针对这些人说预言：“看啊！主率领祂千万的圣者一同降临，

csbs.text: 亚当的第七代子孙以诺也曾预言这些人，说： “看哪，主带着他的千万圣者来临，
